calendar.matters:
Motion For A New Trial And Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-25-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for defendant's motion to vacate judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:47 a.m. breaking at 10:04 a.m.

Counsel for the Plaintiff Ilene Hochstein appeared via zoom.
Defendant Yi Chen Chien appeared in court.

Defendant was assisted by Mandarin Interpreter Aidong Ni.

The court addresses both Ilene Hochstein and Yi Chen Chien re: service of the pleadings in this case.

After review of the pleadings and hearing of testimony from both sides, the court determines the defendant was properly notice in this case and the court DENIES the defendant's motion to vacate judgment.

Motion For A New Trial And Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Continued To Jul-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for defendant's motion for a new trial and motion to vacate judgment filed by Yi Chen Chien.

Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505

Plaintiff Yeuzi Xu was not present.
Counsel for Plaintiff Ilene M. Hochstein appeared via zoom.
Defendant Yi Chen Chien appeared in court

The court is unable to provide either a Cantonese Interpreter to the Petitioner nor a Mandarin Interpreter to the Defendant.

This matter is continued to July 25, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to provide interpreters for both parties in this case.

Motion For A New Trial And Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-06-2025 Continued To Jun-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

Motion For A New Trial And Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar May-09-2025 Continued To Jun-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: Dept.505; Judge: Branden Woods; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:24:10 a.m. and concluding at 9:38:38 am.(D505)

RE: Defendant's Motion for A New Trial

Appearances:
Ilene Hochstein, Esq. appearing on Zoom Video Conference for Plaintiff Yeuzi Xu who was not present.
Defendant Chien Yi-Chen appeared in pro per, was placed under oath but did not testify. Defendant is assisted by Mandarin speaking Interpreter Aidong Ni; provisionally certified.

The Court continues the matter to be heard by Judge Branden Woods.
Plaintiff counsel objects and argues as to the motion.

The Court continues the matter over the objection of Plaintiff's counsel.
Defendant provides documents to the Court.
The court orders documents are scanned and emailed to the parties by the clerk.

The matter is continued to June 6, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion (Motions) (Motions)
Off Calendar Oct-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Yi Chen Chien

Dept.505; Judge: Cecilia Castellanos; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 11:44:35 a.m. and concluding at 12:13:09 p.m. (D505)

Ilene M. Hocstein, Esq. representing Plaintiff Yeuzi Xu who was placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Yi Chen Chien not appearing.

Plaintiff waives the assistance of a Cantonese speaking interpreter, and would like to proceed with the hearing.
The Court to make a couple of comments prior to examination of the plaintiff.
The Court inquires as to the amended declaration regarding interest calculation submitted to the court.
Counsel states that the amounts on the proposed judgment were incorrect and offers proof.
Counsel to examine Plaintiff. Plaintiff testifies.
Plaintiff confirms that statements and declarations made are true and correct
The calculation of the interest is discussed.

After hearing the statements, testimony and reviewing the declaration, good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Yeuzi Xu and against Defendant Yi Chen Chien. The plaintiff shall recover from the defendant as follows:

Damages $70,000.00 - (Credit of $11,500.00 paid by the Defendant) = $58,500.00
Pre-judgment Interest $14,345.24
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $576.51
Total Judgment $73,421.75

Proposed judgment as amended is signed and executed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
